[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A close-up, low-resolution image shows part of a person’s face with a hand partially covering the mouth area.

Main Subject: The main focus is a person’s face in extreme close-up, with the right side of the face and the mouth area visible, and a finger or hand near the lips.

Setting: The background is unclear and out of focus, with a dim indoor or shaded appearance; no specific time of day or weather is visible.

Visual Details: The image is grainy and blurry, with soft, uneven lighting. The person has light-colored skin and dark eyebrows. One eye is partially visible near the top right, looking toward the camera. The mouth and lower face are partly obscured by a finger or hand, and the overall framing is tight, cropped closely around the face. Colors appear muted, with beige skin tones and dark areas around the eye and hairline.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image is a very close-up, blurry photo of a person’s face with a hand or finger near the mouth. The background details are not clear due to the tight crop and blur.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text visible in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only a close-up image with no visible, readable typography or UI text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
